# Accounting & Audit — Reporting Boundaries

## Financial Statement Scope and Audience

| Statement                 | Scope                          | Audience                     |
|---------------------------|-------------------------------|------------------------------|
| Consolidated P&L          | Group entities — IFRS          | Shareholders, Regulators     |
| Consolidated Balance Sheet| Group entities — IFRS          | Shareholders, Regulators     |
| Segment report (IFRS 8)   | Material business segments     | Shareholders                 |
| FINREP Quarterly          | Prudential consolidated group  | ECB / National CA            |
| Solo statutory accounts   | Per legal entity               | Companies House / NCA        |
| Pillar 3 disclosure       | Risk exposures & capital       | Public                       |

## Data Boundary Rules

| Data Category             | Classification  | Sharing Permitted                   |
|---------------------------|----------------|-------------------------------------|
| Trial balance figures     | CONFIDENTIAL   | Finance + Audit only                |
| Audit exceptions          | CONFIDENTIAL   | Audit team + Board Audit Committee  |
| Published annual report   | PUBLIC         | All parties after board approval    |
| ECL provision parameters  | RESTRICTED     | Credit risk + Audit only            |
| Regulatory submissions    | CONFIDENTIAL   | Finance + Regulator liaison only    |

## Reconciliation Reporting Requirements

- GL to sub-ledger reconciliation: produced daily before 09:00
- Breaks > EUR 10,000 auto-escalated to Finance Manager
- Month-end reconciliation sign-off: Finance Manager + Controller
- All reconciliation records retained 7 years (MiFID II / SOX)
